pageContext.name: R2-D2 Topanga Cooler Tote Bag
pageContext.description: The R2-D2 Topanga Cooler Tote is the perfect all-around bag. It's made of durable polyester with complementing stitching accents to enhance its simple yet sophisticated lines. The interior is made of heat-sealed PVC for no leaks and it is large enough to carry 24 soda cans!  It's perfect for carrying food and drinks to the beach or pool and features a separate exterior pocket that's the perfect size for your wallet or keys. It can also be used to carry your wet swimsuits and towels on the trip home.  Make sure to order yours today and May the force be with you!  *Surface wash with a damp cloth.
